chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.D- 1029 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on M.A- 5059 of 2020 (Stay application). 3. For hearing of main case. 01.10.2020 None present. = This constitutional petition is called for hearing. None present on behalf of the petitioner. No intimation received. It is noted that since filing of instant petition, petitioner and his counsel have not pursued the same diligently. It appears that either the purpose for which instant petition was filed has been served or the petitioner has lost his interest in this petition, which is accordingly dismissed in non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE S
